items.question: What is the Cutting Fruit ASMR workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow for generating close-up, satisfying fruit cutting videos highlighting textures and motion.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: Food creators, kitchen brands, advertisers, and ASMR accounts that need crisp, engaging slice visuals.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Describe the fruit types, cutting style, and pacing. Optionally add mood references and style notes.

items.question: What output will I get?
items.answer: Short, platform-ready clips with close-up cutting sequences and satisfying details.

items.question: Can I control speed and framing?
items.answer: Yes. You can specify slow, real-time, or hyper-fast pacing and choose framing preferences.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Each generation consumes credits based on clip length and complexity. Iterate within your plan.
